content.problemStatement: Given an adjacency list of a graph adj of V no. of vertices having 0 based index. Check whether the graph is bipartite or not.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer V, the number of vertices. The next V lines contain the adjacency list of the graph, where each line contains the vertices adjacent to the vertex i.
content.outputFormat: 1 if the graph is bipartite, 0 otherwise

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use DFS to assign colors to each vertex. If a vertex is already colored and has the same color as the current vertex, return false.
